errors.description: Revocation source metadata or preflight evidence is missing.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Deny live-fetch readiness until source metadata is present and preflight verified.

errors.description: Revocation source metadata is malformed or not hash-only.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Deny live-fetch readiness until source type and URI hash are deterministic.

errors.description: Revocation source metadata or response timing is stale.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Deny live-fetch readiness until source freshness is verified.

errors.description: Supplied revocation response metadata is missing or malformed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Deny live-fetch readiness until supplied response metadata is verified.

errors.description: Revocation response signature fingerprint is missing, invalid, or mismatched.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Deny live-fetch readiness until signed response metadata is verified.

errors.description: Revocation response metadata does not bind to the preflight source metadata.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Deny live-fetch readiness until response and source metadata agree.

errors.description: Live-fetch output path is mutable or not local-only.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Deny live-fetch readiness because mutable paths could imply execution.

errors.description: Raw revocation payloads, endpoints, credentials, or runtime artifacts were detected.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Deny live-fetch readiness until diagnostics remain hash-only.

errors.description: Diagnostics include unsafe unredacted fields or secret-like markers.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Deny live-fetch readiness until diagnostics are redacted.
